name: ltx_pipeline
description: LTX-Video 2.3 video generation pipeline. No supervisor LLM — pure functional workflow.
_note: Workflow JSON templates need to be in ComfyUI API format. Export via ComfyUI 'Save (API Format)' or Dev Tools. The 4 workflow files from D: drive are UI format — API-format versions should be saved here as: ltx_img2vid_api.json, ltx_digital_human_api.json, ltx_keyframe2_api.json, ltx_keyframe3_api.json
